title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Cursor's VP of Engineering describes how the company has built agentic workflows across the entire software development lifecycle, moving beyond the 40% productivity plateau of traditional code assistants. The talk covers agent architectures for bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and organizational changes needed to scale agentic systems.
